finiteVersusStructuralRule.finite-24-replicate-marginal-miss: observed rate fails its frozen threshold while the corresponding exact expected probability passes it
finiteVersusStructuralRule.structural-expected-probability-failure: the corresponding exact expected probability itself fails its frozen threshold

pairAmbiguityPolicy: a failed decisive selection on any double-spectrum case is unresolved pair spectral ambiguity; it is not a successful decisive call
singleFailurePolicy: a failed selection on a single-spectrum case is a false decisive single-to-pair call
coverageFailurePolicy: every failed coverage gate is retained even when another failure has higher localization precedence
